summary: Iteration 155: NLYT Stripe Flows & Webhook Protocol Testing. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. All requested flows verified: FLUX1 (card deletion), FLUX2 (appointment without card → Stripe redirect), W3-W8 (webhook handlers). Frontend: Payment settings page working correctly with proper card state display.

passed_tests.FLUX1_delete_card_no_recovery: PASS - DELETE /api/user-settings/me/payment-method removes card, GET returns has_payment_method: false (no auto-recovery)
passed_tests.FLUX2_create_appointment_without_card: PASS - POST /api/appointments/ with penalty_amount > 0 and no card returns status=pending_organizer_guarantee with organizer_checkout_url
passed_tests.W3_transfer_created_handler: PASS - webhooks.py listens for transfer.created (not transfer.paid)
passed_tests.W6_webhook_idempotence: PASS - Idempotence guard exists: duplicate event_id returns {status: duplicate}
passed_tests.W7_invalid_signature_rejected: PASS - POST /api/webhooks/stripe with fake Stripe-Signature returns 400 'Invalid signature'
passed_tests.PAYOUT_SERVICE_handlers: PASS - payout_service.py has handle_transfer_paid and handle_transfer_failed
passed_tests.WEBHOOKS_imports: PASS - webhooks.py imports payout handlers correctly

frontend_tests.login_page: PASS - Login form works correctly with email/password
frontend_tests.dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with 48 engagements, calendar connections visible
frontend_tests.payment_settings_no_card: PASS - Page shows 'Aucune carte enregistrée' with 'Enregistrer une carte' button and warning
frontend_tests.add_card_redirect: PASS - 'Enregistrer une carte' button redirects to real Stripe Checkout (test mode)

critical_code_review_comments: webhooks.py: Correctly uses transfer.created/reversed/updated instead of non-existent transfer.paid/failed
webhooks.py: Idempotence guard properly checks stripe_events collection before processing
webhooks.py: Signature verification active with STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
user_settings.py: DELETE /me/payment-method clears both user-level and participant-level card data to prevent auto-recovery
appointments.py: create_guarantee_with_saved_card() called for Stripe verification when user has saved card
stripe_guarantee_service.py: pm_dev_ payment methods rejected when real Stripe key is configured
PaymentSettings.js: Proper data-testid attributes for testing (saved-card-display, no-card-display, add-card-btn, remove-card-btn)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Stripe flows and webhook handlers verified. FLUX1 (card deletion) and FLUX2 (appointment without card → Stripe redirect) working correctly. Webhook handlers W3-W8 all exist and are properly configured. Signature verification active. Idempotence guard in place. Frontend payment settings page displays correct state (no card / saved card) with proper buttons.

mocked_apis.stripe: Real Stripe test mode (sk_test_*) - NOT mocked

webhook_handlers_verified.checkout.session.completed: Line 68 - handles guarantee setup and default payment method
webhook_handlers_verified.account.updated: Line 146 - handles Stripe Connect account updates
